channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, tech, and health headlines ranked by freshness and interest.

item.title: Age Caps Are Blocking Experienced Doctors From Specialist Training — Medical Officer
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The public health system needs more specialists, yet rigid age limits block long-serving doctors from specialist training, even if self-funded. The policy risks wasting experienced talent and undermining efforts to expand the public sector specialist workforce. The post Age Caps Are Blocking Experienced Doctors From Specialist Training — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: urgent(+3), policy(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Master’s Graduates Run Hospitals On ‘Study Leave’ But Can’t Apply For Subspecialty Training — Physician
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A requirement for three consecutive full-year LNPT reports may delay subspecialty training for Master’s graduates by several years. One doctor says this is because Master’s training is classified as “study leave”, despite trainees continuing to run wards, clinics, and on-calls. The post Master’s Graduates Run Hospitals On ‘Study Leave’ But Can’t Apply For Subspecialty Training — Physician appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Passport scandal in football: who put Malaysia here?
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
With seven bans and a heavy fine settled, the bigger question of accountability and citizenship remains.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2), malaysia(+3), football(+1)

item.title: Coronary Stent Excluded From Civil Servants’ GL Coverage In Public Hospitals: UiTM
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
UiTM says coronary stents are not covered under civil servants’ guarantee letters (GL) for treatment in UiTM Hospital, in line with procedures in MOH hospitals. Stents are categorised as special devices, for which applicants can request financial aid. The post Coronary Stent Excluded From Civil Servants’ GL Coverage In Public Hospitals: UiTM appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Teen Pregnancy Data Is Incomplete Without Abortion Figures — Dr SP Choong
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Dr SP Choong argues teen pregnancy data cited in a Ministry of Health report is misleading because it counts only hospital births, not abortions. He says the issue must also address access to safe, legal abortion and accurate information. The post Teen Pregnancy Data Is Incomplete Without Abortion Figures — Dr SP Choong appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), ministry(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Down but not out: Emerging markets could endure Middle East shocks, investors say
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
Sell-off could have further to run, investors warnStrong fundamentals in emerging markets aid appeal during crisesHigh o...
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), war(+3), sanctions(+2), inflation(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Why Children Have Rights, And Older Persons Still Rely On ‘Kindness’
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
If Malaysia is serious about preparing for the “grey wave”, it must move beyond well-meaning policies and begin building a rights-based legal architecture for ageing. The post Why Children Have Rights, And Older Persons Still Rely On ‘Kindness’ appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), ministry(+2), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Daim’s family, lawyers file suit to block ‘topple govt’ probe
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The five plaintiffs are seeking a declaration that the investigation is unlawful, tainted with bad faith, and carried out with ulterior purposes.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Rights group demands answers over teens’ detention under Sosma
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Suaram executive director Azura Nasron says the two teenagers are in custody and have met their lawyers.
Matched: law(+3), ministry(+2), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)
